title: pertya pungens
intro: Pertya pungens, also known as the Perty's aster or Perty's daisy, is a plant species in the daisy family native to the Philippines. It is used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Pertya pungens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
